sentences.translation: Mislim da je briga o čistoći obaveza.
sentences.translationEn: I think that caring about cleanliness is an obligation.

sentences.translation: Čovjek koji je uredan živi u boljem zdravlju.
sentences.translationEn: A clean person lives in better health.

sentences.arabic: أُحَاوِلُ أَنْ أُحَافِظَ عَلَى نَظَافَةِ بَيْتِي وَشَارِعِي.
sentences.translation: Trudim se održavati čistim svoju kuću i ulicu.
sentences.translationEn: I try to keep my house and my street clean.

sentences.arabic: النَّظَافَةُ مَسْؤُولِيَّةُ كُلِّ شَخْصٍ وَلَيْسَ شَخْصًا وَاحِدًا.
sentences.translation: Čistoća je odgovornost svake osobe, a ne samo jedne.
sentences.translationEn: Cleanliness is the responsibility of every person and not just one person.
